checkout_record_prep.scope_line: Monthly optimization scope for one exact licensed domain.
checkout_record_prep.included_line: Includes documentation, validation posture and protected access expectations.
checkout_record_prep.short_public_copy: Guardian Core Monthly is the clear entry point for one exact licensed domain. It is built for controlled SEO and performance optimization with validation and rollback.
approval_required_reasons: no real checkout processor is connected in the workspace
real invoice issuance and payment confirmation remain outside the local preview path
customer contact and fulfillment confirmation still require operator review
